name: Synup Office Hour #1 - 5th March 2024
episode_summary: Join us for an exclusive webinar where we'll explore the latest strategies for dominating local search. From Google algorithm updates to practical tips, get ready to elevate your online presence. Register now!
episode_summary_rich_text:
• Google implemented a significant update called the "Helpful Content Update" during the last quarter of 2023, aiming to prioritize user-focused content over keyword-focused content in search results.
  • The impact of the Helpful Content Update can be assessed through Google Search Console, with significant drops in traffic signaling potential effects.
  • Local businesses are advised to display pricing on their websites, as it positively impacts traffic and click-through rates, especially for price-conscious customers.
  • Google is speculated to introduce stricter verification processes for Local Services Ads, aiming to enhance the credibility of businesses advertising through these channels.
  • Google removed the option of free business sites generated from Google Business Profile dashboards, suggesting alternatives like WordPress or Wix for creating websites, with Wix being highlighted for its SEO improvements.

‍

We discussed Google Helpful Content Update, Synup's automation capabilities, and a lot more. Tune in!

· Get the event deck here
· Get the event notes here
